author.bio: A peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol to make the web faster, safer, and more open.
author.name: IPFS

content.text: Looking for an IPFS meetup in Beijing, Delhi, London, Boston or more? Find and chat with neighbors all around the world: https://github.com/ipfs/community/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3Ameetup
